msg: warning: Variable m_has_modinfo is a dead store!
reasoning: Line 18 is 'm_has_modinfo = 1;' in the else branch of an if-else (line 16 assigns m_has_modinfo = 0 in the if branch). After both assignments, m_has_modinfo is never read — the rest of the function only references k_crcs and exit_status. Both assignments are dead stores; the tool flags the else-branch at line 18. The presence condition [True] is correctly constrained since this code is not inside any #ifdef. The vbdb entry (5275b1e) documents an UndeclaredIdentifier bug (!FEATURE_INSMOD_VERSION_CHECKING, about k_crcs), which is unrelated. New true positive, correctly constrained.
